name: academorix/service-accounts
purpose: Machine credentials — the ServiceAccount aggregate (svc_...) for inter-service HS256 JWTs and Sanctum PATs used by peer services, workers, and CI.
capabilities: Scope + permission binding for machine callers
Consumed by the service-jwt inter-service contract
Compatible with Sanctum PATs for out-of-band scripts
when_to_use: Issuing credentials to a peer service, worker, or CI pipeline that authenticates without a human.
when_not_to_use: For human sessions and refresh tokens, use the sibling academorix/auth package instead.
